title: GTA Online
headline: GTA Online
subtitle: LD Organics Presents: The 420 Event
content:
The man with the van and the plan is putting his stamp on Los Santos this 420 as LD Organics Presents: The 420 Event. Celebrate with a new Hunting Pack (Get Lamar) location that’s dispensing 4X Rewards, enjoy a kaleidoscope of hallucinations along with increasingly unhinged enemies in the new Stoner Survival, and claim your own Black LD Organics Tee.

Get twice the green for Short Trips, discounts on Weed Farm Businesses, look out for the return of psychedelic Peyote Plants, and much more.
